title: World Cup Farewell Movie Poster AI
sourceTitle: World Cup Farewell Movie Poster AI Prompt

imagePrompts.prompt: Theme: Cinematic final-tournament farewell poster for FAREWELL WALK, centered on fictional legendary football icon walking toward the final tournament stage during a luminous global football championship walkout. Subject: fictional legendary football icon walking toward the final tournament stage is shown from behind in red and green national-style jersey with an iconic gold back number and realistic wet fabric texture, centered on a glowing pathway toward the stadium and distant trophy silhouette. Scene: The stadium atmosphere is built from roaring Portuguese supporters, red-green flags, gold confetti, fireworks, smoke, and a glowing trophy silhouette, with national flags, fireworks, confetti, smoke, floodlights, and emotional final-chapter spectacle filling the arena. Composition: Vertical blockbuster sports-poster layout with a massive readable title at the top, the back-view hero locked to the center axis, a glowing path leading into the stadium, trophy light in the distance, crowd scale around the lower depth, and documentary-style footer hierarchy. Signature Elements: Back-view farewell walk, iconic jersey number, glowing pathway, distant trophy silhouette, flag-waving supporters, fireworks, confetti, sparks, floodlights, and one-last-tournament emotion. Fixed source details: National Colors: deep red, forest green, and antique gold. Style: Ultra-realistic sports movie-poster artwork with Netflix-style documentary emotion, Hollywood farewell-campaign drama, detailed crowd texture, realistic football fabric, cinematic smoke, volumetric stadium glow, wet reflective ground, and epic scale. Color Palette: EPIC FIFA WORLD CUP 2026 MOVIE POSTER, legendary football icon viewed from behind, walking alone toward the center of a massive illuminated stadium, wearing national team jersey with iconic number on the back, thousands dominate the flags, kit accents, and crowd graphics, balanced with golden stadium light, deep night contrast, smoke white, and firework highlights. Lighting: Strong golden backlight from the stadium tunnel, dramatic rim light around the jersey silhouette, bright floodlights cutting through smoke, and controlled high-contrast poster shadows. Camera: Low rear three-quarter poster viewpoint, wide cinematic lens feel, deep stadium perspective, sharp hero silhouette, and atmospheric depth through the crowd and smoke. Typography: Large top text FAREWELL WALK; secondary tournament line EPIC FIFA WORLD CUP 2026 MOVIE POSTER, legendary football icon viewed from behind, walking alone toward the center of a massive illuminated stadium, wearing national; short emotional tagline ONE LAST DREAM; all text must be bold, cinematic, and readable inside the poster design. Restrictions: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure.

promptTranslations.zh:
使用以下英文图像生成提示词；保留可见文字、品牌名、变量值和参数为英文。

imagePrompts.title: World Cup Farewell Movie Poster Variant 01

imagePrompts.prompt: Theme: Cinematic final-tournament farewell poster for FAREWELL WALK, centered on fictional legendary football icon walking toward the final tournament stage during a luminous global football championship walkout. Subject: fictional legendary football icon walking toward the final tournament stage is shown from behind in sky-blue and white striped national-style jersey with a bold back number and rainlit fabric folds, centered on a glowing pathway toward the stadium and distant trophy silhouette. Scene: The stadium atmosphere is built from flag-waving supporters, blue-white confetti, golden sparks, smoke, floodlights, and a trophy glow beyond the pitch, with national flags, fireworks, confetti, smoke, floodlights, and emotional final-chapter spectacle filling the arena. Composition: Vertical blockbuster sports-poster layout with a massive readable title at the top, the back-view hero locked to the center axis, a glowing path leading into the stadium, trophy light in the distance, crowd scale around the lower depth, and documentary-style footer hierarchy. Signature Elements: Back-view farewell walk, iconic jersey number, glowing pathway, distant trophy silhouette, flag-waving supporters, fireworks, confetti, sparks, floodlights, and one-last-tournament emotion. Fixed source details: National Colors: sky blue, white, and championship gold. Style: Ultra-realistic sports movie-poster artwork with Netflix-style documentary emotion, Hollywood farewell-campaign drama, detailed crowd texture, realistic football fabric, cinematic smoke, volumetric stadium glow, wet reflective ground, and epic scale. Color Palette: EPIC FIFA WORLD CUP 2026 MOVIE POSTER, legendary football icon viewed from behind, walking alone toward the center of a massive illuminated stadium, wearing national team jersey with iconic number on the back, thousands dominate the flags, kit accents, and crowd graphics, balanced with golden stadium light, deep night contrast, smoke white, and firework highlights. Lighting: Strong golden backlight from the stadium tunnel, dramatic rim light around the jersey silhouette, bright floodlights cutting through smoke, and controlled high-contrast poster shadows. Camera: Low rear three-quarter poster viewpoint, wide cinematic lens feel, deep stadium perspective, sharp hero silhouette, and atmospheric depth through the crowd and smoke. Typography: Large top text FAREWELL WALK; secondary tournament line EPIC FIFA WORLD CUP 2026 MOVIE POSTER, legendary football icon viewed from behind, walking alone toward the center of a massive illuminated stadium, wearing national; short emotional tagline FOR THE LAST TIME; all text must be bold, cinematic, and readable inside the poster design. Restrictions: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure.

Signature Elements: Back-view farewell walk, iconic jersey number, glowing pathway, distant trophy silhouette, flag-waving supporters, fireworks, confetti, sparks, floodlights, and one-last-tournament emotion. Fixed source details: National Colors: sky blue, white, and championship gold. Style: Ultra-realistic sports movie-poster artwork with Netflix-style documentary emotion, Hollywood farewell-campaign drama, detailed crowd texture, realistic football fabric, cinematic smoke, volumetric stadium glow, wet reflective ground, and epic scale. Color Palette: EPIC FIFA WORLD CUP 2026 MOVIE POSTER, legendary football icon viewed from behind, walking alone toward the center of a massive illuminated stadium, wearing national team jersey with iconic number on the back, thousands dominate the flags, kit accents, and crowd graphics, balanced with golden stadium light, deep night contrast, smoke white, and firework highlights. Lighting: Strong golden backlight from the stadium tunnel, dramatic rim light around the jersey silhouette, bright floodlights cutting through smoke, and controlled high-contrast poster shadows. Camera: Low rear three-quarter poster viewpoint, wide cinematic lens feel, deep stadium perspective, sharp hero silhouette, and atmospheric depth through the crowd and smoke. Typography: Large top text FAREWELL WALK; secondary tournament line EPIC FIFA WORLD CUP 2026 MOVIE POSTER, legendary football icon viewed from behind, walking alone toward the center of a massive illuminated stadium, wearing national; short emotional tagline FOR THE LAST TIME; all text must be bold, cinematic, and readable inside the poster design. Restrictions: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure.
